data.name: Space Guardian
data.detailed_description:
This is a fast-paced arcade-style casual car battle game. The levels are all randomly generated by the program and can be challenged forever.

Gameplay

  • 6 types of vehicles and 6 types of weapons are available for collection.
  • After destroying the enemies in each level, go to the next level.
  • Upgrade the attributes of the battle car as you like.
  • All over again after failure.
  • Can be played with one hand.

data.short_description: Robots have launched an attack on humans, and the space guardian force is dispatched to fight to defend the earth! This is a fast-paced arcade-style casual car battle game. The levels are all randomly generated by the program and can be challenged forever.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 波蘭文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel i5 Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
